name: bud
description: Create a new oracle (bud from parent)

cli.help:
maw bud <name> [--from <oracle>] [--root] [--blank] [--org <org>] [--repo org/repo] [--issue N] [--note <text>] [--fast] [--split] [--dry-run]
       maw bud <name> --tiny --parent <oracle>  (nested leaf oracle inside parent's vault)
